script:
set +e

echo "== Migrate david (lu: david) =="
if ! id "david" >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo useradd -m -s /bin/bash "david" && echo created; fi
sudo usermod -a -G azureuser "david"
sudo -u "david" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude "/home/david/.claude" 2>/dev/null
sudo -u "david" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude.json "/home/david/.claude.json" 2>/dev/null
sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure "/home/david/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo chown -R "david:david" "/home/david/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo systemctl stop "david-bot.service" "david-responder.service" 2>/dev/null
PORT=$(sudo grep -oE 'PORT=[0-9]+' "/etc/systemd/system/david-bot.service" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2)
echo "  PORT=$PORT"
for f in "david-bot.py" "david-responder.py" "david-graph-token.sh" "david-send-to.sh" "david-remember.sh" "david-install-chat-app.sh" "david-pinned.sh" "david-download.sh"; do
  [ -f "/home/azureuser/$f" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/$f" "/home/david/"
done
[ -d "/home/azureuser/.david-bot" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/.david-bot" "/home/david/"
[ -d "/home/azureuser/david-teams-app" ] && sudo cp -r "/home/azureuser/david-teams-app" "/home/david/"
for f in "/home/david/david-bot.py" "/home/david/david-responder.py" /home/david/david-*.sh; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && sudo sed -i "s|/home/azureuser/\.david-bot|/home/david/.david-bot|g; s|/home/azureuser/david-|/home/david/david-|g" "$f"
done
sudo chown -R "david:david" "/home/david/david-bot.py" "/home/david/david-responder.py" /home/david/david-*.sh "/home/david/.david-bot" "/home/david/david-teams-app" 2>/dev/null
sudo chmod 600 "/home/david/.david-bot/creds.json" 2>/dev/null
for unit in "david-bot" "david-responder"; do
  UF="/etc/systemd/system/${unit}.service"
  sudo tee "$UF" > /dev/null <<UNIT
[Unit]
Description=${unit} (per-user Linux account: david)
After=network-online.target $(if [ "$unit" = "david-responder" ]; then echo "david-bot.service"; fi)
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=david
WorkingDirectory=/home/david
Environment=HOME=/home/david
Environment=PATH=/home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
$(if [ "$unit" = "david-bot" ]; then echo "Environment=PORT=$PORT"; fi)
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/david/${unit}.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
UNIT
done
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl start "david-bot.service" "david-responder.service"
sleep 3
echo "  bot=$(systemctl is-active david-bot.service) resp=$(systemctl is-active david-responder.service)"

echo "== Migrate emily-claude (lu: emily) =="
if ! id "emily" >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo useradd -m -s /bin/bash "emily" && echo created; fi
sudo usermod -a -G azureuser "emily"
sudo -u "emily" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude "/home/emily/.claude" 2>/dev/null
sudo -u "emily" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude.json "/home/emily/.claude.json" 2>/dev/null
sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure "/home/emily/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo chown -R "emily:emily" "/home/emily/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo systemctl stop "emily-claude-bot.service" "emily-claude-responder.service" 2>/dev/null
PORT=$(sudo grep -oE 'PORT=[0-9]+' "/etc/systemd/system/emily-claude-bot.service" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2)
echo "  PORT=$PORT"
for f in "emily-claude-bot.py" "emily-claude-responder.py" "emily-claude-graph-token.sh" "emily-claude-send-to.sh" "emily-claude-remember.sh" "emily-claude-install-chat-app.sh" "emily-claude-pinned.sh" "emily-claude-download.sh"; do
  [ -f "/home/azureuser/$f" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/$f" "/home/emily/"
done
[ -d "/home/azureuser/.emily-claude-bot" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/.emily-claude-bot" "/home/emily/"
[ -d "/home/azureuser/emily-claude-teams-app" ] && sudo cp -r "/home/azureuser/emily-claude-teams-app" "/home/emily/"
for f in "/home/emily/emily-claude-bot.py" "/home/emily/emily-claude-responder.py" /home/emily/emily-claude-*.sh; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && sudo sed -i "s|/home/azureuser/\.emily-claude-bot|/home/emily/.emily-claude-bot|g; s|/home/azureuser/emily-claude-|/home/emily/emily-claude-|g" "$f"
done
sudo chown -R "emily:emily" "/home/emily/emily-claude-bot.py" "/home/emily/emily-claude-responder.py" /home/emily/emily-claude-*.sh "/home/emily/.emily-claude-bot" "/home/emily/emily-claude-teams-app" 2>/dev/null
sudo chmod 600 "/home/emily/.emily-claude-bot/creds.json" 2>/dev/null
for unit in "emily-claude-bot" "emily-claude-responder"; do
  UF="/etc/systemd/system/${unit}.service"
  sudo tee "$UF" > /dev/null <<UNIT
[Unit]
Description=${unit} (per-user Linux account: emily)
After=network-online.target $(if [ "$unit" = "emily-claude-responder" ]; then echo "emily-claude-bot.service"; fi)
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=emily
WorkingDirectory=/home/emily
Environment=HOME=/home/emily
Environment=PATH=/home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
$(if [ "$unit" = "emily-claude-bot" ]; then echo "Environment=PORT=$PORT"; fi)
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/emily/${unit}.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
UNIT
done
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl start "emily-claude-bot.service" "emily-claude-responder.service"
sleep 3
echo "  bot=$(systemctl is-active emily-claude-bot.service) resp=$(systemctl is-active emily-claude-responder.service)"
